title: Final Report Schema
description: Schema for the final lottery draw integrity analysis report.

correlation_coefficient.description: Spearman correlation coefficient between jackpot amount and uniformity metrics.

p_value.description: Raw p-value for the correlation test.

confidence_interval.description: 95% Confidence interval [lower_bound, upper_bound] for the correlation coefficient.

bonferroni_adjusted_p.description: P-value adjusted using Bonferroni correction for multiple hypothesis testing.

threshold.description: The threshold value used for sensitivity analysis.

metric_value.description: The resulting metric value at this threshold.

sensitivity_table.description: Table of sensitivity analysis results across different threshold values.

is_significant.description: True if the adjusted p-value is less than 0.05, indicating statistical significance.

outlier_sensitivity_delta.description: Absolute difference in correlation coefficient when extreme outliers (>10x mean jackpot) are removed.

warnings.description: List of warnings generated during analysis (e.g., insufficient data in tiers).

control_variable_note.description: Mandatory note regarding the inability to control for Quick Pick rates.
control_variable_note.const: Quick Pick rate unobservable; no control applied

tier_analysis.description: Optional: Results broken down by jackpot tiers (Small/Medium/Large).
